channel.title: FootballAnt Match Signals
channel.description: FootballAnt lineup clarity, fan mood, chaos watch and pre-match football intelligence.

item.title: Chaos Match Watch
item.description: A shareable FootballAnt watchlist for chaos match energy, trap-game alerts and lineup panic risk.

item.title: Fan Mood Index
item.description: A signal-driven estimate of pre-match fan confidence, pressure and injury tension.

item.title: Lineup Clarity Board
item.description: A daily FootballAnt board for pre-match lineup clarity, injury tension and volatility signals.
